title: Zarina Project
overview: A Silpakorn Game Design thesis tower defense project where I programmed custom tower assembly, base and tower placement, stage flow, and dynamic pathfinding that reacts when players reshape enemy routes.

title: Pandora Hunter
overview: A Thai-inspired mobile board game and my first professional online game project, where I supported Unity UI, API integration, JSON data handling, and varied stage design.

title: Sekai O Sukuu
overview: A remote game jam turn-based party RPG created during the COVID period, where I programmed dialog flow, party selection, battle state, damage actions, enemy turns, and scene transitions.

title: X Battle Cars PVP
overview: Online P2P vehicle combat game using Photon PUN2, focused on stabilizing room data sync, reconnect behavior, host migration, inventory, skills, buffs, and player car selection.
